title: Climbable Chain
description: This datapack allows you to climb up the chain
body:
## Showcase
Now you can climb up the chain

![Showcase1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KWvlUYeF/images/b5d0b675a0bc2133d45f279544eab39c6c93b496.gif)

And you can climb up the iron bars
![Showcase2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KWvlUYeF/images/1cfd41755e4625e8608ae290383b327cb743d94d.gif)

And you can climb up the bamboo
![Showcase3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KWvlUYeF/images/c05f202fe7db9a5c7c7309aa071a9805934ad55b.gif)
